overall.description: Game footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student in wizard robes walking through a dim stone corridor and entering the Great Hall during breakfast. The scene transitions from a narrow gothic hallway to a vast, candle-lit dining hall filled with students at long tables beneath floating candles and stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone corridor with suits of armor

events.description: character reaches and opens the large wooden doors at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dim corridor toward the large wooden doors

entered.detail: Dark grey stone walls with gothic architectural details and pointed arches
Massive double doors with ornate carvings, metal studs, and intricate paneling
Thick cylindrical stone columns supporting the corridor ceiling
Full suit of medieval knight armor standing on a stone pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit stone corridor with gothic architecture, approaching a large ornate wooden door at the end. The corridor is empty except for a suit of armor standing against the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and house tables

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically from dim corridor to bright hall illuminated by floating candles and natural light from stained glass windows
a student in blue robes enters the frame from the right side and walks along the wall

agents.ego_description: standing at the entrance observing the busy breakfast scene in the Great Hall

notable_agents.action: student in blue robes walking along the right wall of the hall toward the foreground

entered.detail: Hundreds of lit candles floating magically in mid-air throughout the hall ceiling
Tall gothic arched windows with colorful stained glass panels at the far end
Long wooden house tables lined with students eating breakfast
High stone arched ceiling with magical ambiance and floating candles
Decorative stone archway marking the entrance to the Great Hall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the magnificent Great Hall, a vast gothic dining chamber filled with hundreds of students seated at long wooden tables. Warm golden light streams through tall stained glass windows while hundreds of candles float magically overhead. The camera remains stationary at the entrance, capturing the bustling breakfast atmosphere as students eat and converse, with occasional movement along the aisles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, dim stone corridor into the expansive brilliance of the Great Hall. It begins by following a character through a narrow gothic hallway, passing a solitary suit of armor as they approach a set of large, ornate wooden doors. As the doors open, the confined space suddenly gives way to a magnificent dining chamber filled with hundreds of students seated at long wooden tables. The lighting shifts from the shadows of the corridor to a warm golden glow streaming through tall stained glass windows, while hundreds of candles float magically overhead. The camera then settles at the entrance, capturing the bustling breakfast atmosphere and the constant movement of students throughout the vast hall.
